typography.instructions: Import 'Space Grotesk' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts. Replace existing 'Inter' and 'Playfair Display' usage for main UI elements. Use Space Grotesk for all Headings (h1-h3). Use Manrope for body text.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous (2x standard). Use p-8, p-12, p-24 for sections.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium border border-white/10

cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-card border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(59,130,246,0.15)]

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-lg h-12 px-4 text-base transition-all

digital_stamp.description: A circular, rotating badge component representing the digital seal.
digital_stamp.style: rounded-full border-2 border-tls_gold/30 bg-tls_blue_deep/20 backdrop-blur-md animate-[spin_10s_linear_infinite]

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: url('/noise.png') opacity-5 fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-50

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text is #F8FAFC on dark backgrounds. Avoid dark grey on black.

hero_background.alt: Abstract digital security grid representing blockchain verification
hero_background.usage: Full width background for Hero section with overlay gradient

advocate_dashboard.alt: Professional advocate working on digital dashboard

verification_demo.alt: Scanning QR code on mobile device
verification_demo.usage: Feature section: 'How it Works' - Verification step

admin_context.usage: Admin dashboard login or features section

implementation_steps: 1. Install dependencies: `npm install lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`
2. Update `tailwind.config.js` with the new color palette and font families (Space Grotesk, Manrope).
3. Update `index.css` to set the dark theme variables as default.
5. Create `src/pages/LandingPage.jsx` implementing the Asymmetric Hero and Bento Grid.
7. Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for text unless it is a large heading.
DO NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Space Grotesk' for headings and 'Manrope' for body.
Prefer 'flex' and 'grid' over absolute positioning where possible.
Use 'backdrop-blur' heavily for that modern 'glass' feel.
Ensure mobile responsiveness: Stack grids to 1 column on mobile.
